craftsmanship.name: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.desc: Lashes together a rough workbench from salvaged materials.
craftsmanship.tooltip: Unlocks the Workbench — crafts augments and consumables over waves.

basic_obs.name: Basic Observation
basic_obs.desc: Trains observers to watch enemy movements more closely.
basic_obs.tooltip: Expands the Lab's observation radius by 1 tile, collecting Dust from a wider area.

beekeeping.name: Apiculture
beekeeping.desc: Cultivates hives whose swarms harry goblin raiders.
beekeeping.tooltip: Unlocks the Beehive building, which sends bees to sting and slow nearby enemies.

honey_production.name: Sweet Harvest
honey_production.desc: The hive produces more than just stings.
honey_production.tooltip: Beehives produce 1 Honey per wave. Honey slows enemies on path tiles, same as Sticky Sap.

settling_basics.name: Settl. Basics
settling_basics.desc: Establishes the foundations of your settlement.
settling_basics.tooltip: Unlocks the Hoard Pile for storing resources.

pattern_rec.name: Pattern Recognition
pattern_rec.desc: Deciphers the goblin tongue from battlefield recordings.
pattern_rec.tooltip: Unlocks Goblin Translations lore entries in the Bestiary.

avian.name: Avian Mastery
avian.desc: Trains a great heron as a precision aerial striker.
avian.tooltip: Unlocks the Heron tower, a high-damage single-target sniper.

combat_training.name: Combat Training
combat_training.desc: Establishes a formal training regimen for your tower crews.
combat_training.tooltip: Unlocks the tower skill upgrade system — spend Dust to upgrade individual towers.

structural.name: Structural Analysis
structural.desc: Studies how goblins wear down fortifications over time.
structural.tooltip: Displays age counters on towers. Allows upgrading Hoard Piles.

monkey_business.name: Monkey Business
monkey_business.desc: Domesticates local primates for resource logistics.
monkey_business.tooltip: Unlocks the Monkey Hut (assigns monkeys to gather, courier, or boost) and the Stockpile.

artifact_slot.name: Runic Harness
artifact_slot.desc: Crafts an additional harness mount for carrying a second artifact.

neuron_activation.name: Neuron Activation
neuron_activation.desc: Monkeys learn to recognize and deploy path items autonomously.
neuron_activation.tooltip: Courier and Round Robin monkeys automatically place consumable traps/sap when delivering to a path tile.

monkey_training.name: Monkey Training
monkey_training.desc: Refines training regimens to house an extra monkey.
monkey_training.tooltip: Each existing and future Monkey Hut gains +1 monkey capacity.

stockpile_iface.name: Resource Interface
stockpile_iface.desc: Reroutes the stockpile directly into the settlement ledger.
stockpile_iface.tooltip: Unlocks Interface Mode on Stockpiles — deposited items go straight to your inventory.

the_forge.name: The Forge
the_forge.desc: Harnesses steam and iron to push beyond the stone age.
the_forge.tooltip: Advances the settlement to the Steam Age, enabling industrial buildings.

automation.name: AI Automation
automation.desc: Constructs a mechanical agent that never sleeps.
automation.tooltip: Unlocks the Robot support, which automatically casts spells during waves.

monkey_logistics.name: Monkey Logistics
monkey_logistics.desc: Advanced primate training: rotating deliveries and forest foraging.
monkey_logistics.tooltip: Unlocks Round Robin (cycle up to 5 delivery targets) and Harvest (mine rock nodes or forage wood from forest) roles for monkeys.

frequency_analysis.name: Frequency Analysis
frequency_analysis.desc: We designed a crystal that intends to capture this frequency.
frequency_analysis.tooltip: Unlocks the Resonating Gem — a placeable structure. Its purpose is unclear.

knowledge_otherworldly.name: Knowledge of the Otherworldly
knowledge_otherworldly.desc: What the Watcher saw in you, you can now use.
knowledge_otherworldly.tooltip: Monkeys can now carry Dust from the Lab to Workbenches and Stockpiles.

variable.name: Reptilian Lore
variable.desc: Bonds with a vicious lizard that haunts the stone walls.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Lizard tower, a close-range area-damage attacker.

variable.name: Magnificent Show
variable.desc: A charismatic performer who disorients enemy formations.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Clown support, which periodically reverses enemy movement direction.

variable.name: Crude Optics
variable.desc: Grinds rough lenses that dramatically extend Lab range.
variable.tooltip: Expands the Lab's observation radius by 2 tiles.

variable.name: Bonfire Theory
variable.desc: Studies the morale effect of light and warmth on defenders.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Campfire tower, which buffs the fire rate of adjacent towers.

variable.name: Aquatic Studies
variable.desc: Catalogues creatures lurking in the coastal shallows.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Fish tower — fast-firing with splash damage.

variable.name: Insightful Seahorse
variable.desc: An enigmatic seahorse that instinctively hunts what others cannot see.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Seahorse tower — piercing shots that prioritize and reveal stealth enemies by default.

variable.name: Insightful Lens
variable.desc: Theoretical optics for seeing the unseen — must still be ground and assembled at a workbench.
variable.tooltip: Unlocks the Insightful Lens recipe at the Workbench. Apply the crafted lens to a Lab to let all towers in its radius target stealth enemies.
